subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Covenant! Give thanks unto God that thou hast been a manifestation of the favours of the Day-Star of horizons and the dawning-place of lights [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده میثاق شکر کن خدا را که مظهر الطاف نیر آفاق بودی و مطلع انوار کوکب
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
